verifier_values.criteria: State that the new per session price in Michigan in 2026 for ketamine TRD treatment is $400 (acceptable range $396 to $404)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: State that the new per session price in Michigan in 2026 for ketamine TRD treatment is any other value than $400.4
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: Mean price per session in Michigan in 2025 is 400.43. This can be calculated by filtering the "Ketamine_TRD_session_sample_4.xslx" file column C by "Michigan" and column B by 2025 dates. The highest lower integer is 400

verifier_values.criteria: State that the updated COGS for 2026 are ($17,149,248) (acceptable range $16,977,756 to $17,320,740)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: State that the updated COGS for 2026 are any other value than ($17,149,248)

verifier_values.criteria: State that the updated Gross Profit for 2026 is $4,011,811 (acceptable range $3,971,693 to $4,051,929)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: State that the updated Gross Profit for 2026 is any value other than $4,011,811

verifier_values.criteria: State that the updated Gross Margin for 2026 is 19% (acceptable range 18.8% to 19.2%)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: State that the updated Gross Margin for 2026 is any value other than 19%

verifier_values.criteria: State that the updated SG&A for 2026 is ($2,539,327) (acceptable range $2,513,934 to $2,564,720)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: State that the updated SG&A for 2026 is any value other than ($2,539,327)

verifier_values.criteria: State that the updated EBIT for 2026 is $1,472,484 (acceptable range $1,457,759 to $1,487,209)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: State that the updated EBIT for 2026 is any value other than $1,472,484

verifier_values.criteria: State that the updated EBIT margin for 2026 is 7% (acceptable range 6.9% to 7.1%)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: State that the updated EBIT margin for 2026 is any other value than 7%

verifier_values.criteria: State that the updated EBITDA for 2026 is $1,636,644 (acceptable range $1,620,278 to $1,653,010)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: State that the updated EBITDA for 2026 is any value other than $1,636,644
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: 164,160 of training amortization (specified in prompt to be the only depreciation and amortization) needs to be added back to 1,472,484.1 EBIT

verifier_values.criteria: State that the updated EBITDA margin for 2026 is 8% (acceptable range 7.9% to 8.1%)
verifier_values.negative_criteria: State that the updated EBITSA margin for 2026 is any value other than 8%
